mapper.insert: insert into user_task_event_log(id, user_id, task_code, period_key, source_event_id, create_time) values(#{id, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{userId, jdbcType=BINARY}, #{taskCode}, #{periodKey}, #{sourceEventId}, current_timestamp)
mapper.select: select l.user_id as userId, l.task_code as taskCode, l.period_key as periodKey, l.source_event_id as sourceEventId from user_task_event_log l join task_template t on t.task_code = l.task_code where l.user_id = #{userId, jdbcType=BINARY} and l.source_event_id = #{sourceEventId} and t.trigger_event_type = 'LikeCreated'
